title: impl: space.rs file + space_get, space_changes, space_set_destroy, space_query, space_query_changes
description:
What: Create crates/jmap-chat/src/methods/space.rs and add pub mod space to mod.rs. Implement 5 standard methods.

Algorithm:
1. Add 'pub mod space;' to methods/mod.rs (after space_invite, before private helpers)
2. Create space.rs with use super::{ChangesResponse, GetResponse, QueryChangesResponse, QueryResponse, SetResponse, SpaceQueryInput};
3. space_get(&self, session, ids: Option<&[&str]>, properties: Option<&[&str]>) -> Result<GetResponse<crate::types::Space>, ClientError> — mirror chat_get exactly with 'Space/get'
4. space_changes(&self, session, since_state: &str, max_changes: Option<u64>) -> Result<ChangesResponse, ClientError> — mirror chat_changes with 'Space/changes'
5. space_set_destroy(&self, session, ids: &[&str]) -> Result<SetResponse, ClientError> — guard empty ids, then destroy list with 'Space/set'
6. space_query(&self, session, input: &SpaceQueryInput<'_>) -> Result<QueryResponse, ClientError> — build filter with filter_name (as 'name' key) and filter_is_public (as 'isPublic' key); null filter when empty; optional position/limit
7. space_query_changes(&self, session, since_query_state: &str, max_changes: Option<u64>) -> Result<QueryChangesResponse, ClientError> — omit maxChanges when None

Run cargo fmt, clippy, test. Close bead.
acceptance_criteria: cargo test passes; space.rs exists with 5 methods; clippy clean
